ham.subject: Upcoming Network Maintenance – July 12, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Students and Faculty,

This is a notification from the University IT Services team. A routine upgrade of our campus‑wide network infrastructure is scheduled for July 12, 2026 from 9:00 PM to 1:00 AM local time. During this window, Wi‑Fi and wired connectivity will be intermittent. We recommend you save all ongoing work and plan accordingly. 

If you encounter any issues after the maintenance, please submit a ticket via the IT help portal at <URL> or email itservice@university.edu.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Services Team

spam.subject: Your Tax Refund Is Ready! Act Now to Receive $5,000
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

Congratulations! The IRS has processed your tax return and a refund of $5,000 is pending. To claim your refund, please confirm your personal information and banking details. Failure to provide verification within 3 business days will result in the refund being returned to the agency.

Click the button below to verify your details immediately: <URL>

Thank you,
IRS Customer Service
